answer: \boxed{Betty escapes into a **fantasy identity** as a nurse from her beloved soap opera *A Reason to Love*, immersing herself in the comforting, unreal world to avoid processing the trauma of her husband’s murder. She adopts a childlike innocence, living in denial while pursuing her fictional "ex-fiancé" (the soap opera’s lead character) and even getting a job as a nurse—mirroring her fantasy. This dissociation allows her to temporarily numb her grief until reality forces her back into the present.}
